title: Sysmon LDAP Reconnaissance
description: Detects LDAP enumeration patterns (port 389/636) from suspicious processes. Attackers use LDAP queries to enumerate Active Directory users, groups, computers, and service accounts.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Destination Port' = 389 or 'Destination Port' = 636 or 'Destination Port' = 3268 or 'Destination Port' = 3269) and Initiated = 'true') and (('Process Name' like '*\powershell.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\ldapsearch.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\adfind.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\bloodhound.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\sharphound.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\python.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\python3.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\cmd.exe')))
